title: Sam Altman returns as CEO, OpenAI has a new initial board
titleZh: Sam Altman回归担任首席执行官， OpenAI有了新的初始董事会
summary: Mira Murati as CTO, Greg Brockman returns as President. Read messages from CEO Sam Altman and board chair Bret Taylor.
summaryZh: 米拉·穆拉蒂（ Mira Murati ）担任首席技术官，格雷格·布罗克曼（ G阅读首席执行官Sam Altman和董事会主席Bret Taylor的消息。
highlights: Mira Murati as CTO, Greg Brockman returns as President.
Read messages from CEO Sam Altman and board chair Bret Taylor.

title: New models and developer products announced at DevDay
titleZh: 在DevDay上宣布的新型号和开发人员产品
summary: GPT-4 Turbo with 128K context and lower prices, the new Assistants API, GPT-4 Turbo with Vision, DALL·E 3 API, and more.
summaryZh: 具有128K上下文和更低价格的GPT-4 Turbo、新的Assistants API、GPT-4 Turbo with Vision、DALL · E 3 API等。

title: Introducing GPTs
summary: You can now create custom versions of ChatGPT that combine instructions, extra knowledge, and any combination of skills.
summaryZh: 您现在可以创建ChatGPT的自定义版本，结合说明、额外知识和任何技能组合。
highlights: You can now create custom versions of ChatGPT that combine instructions, extra knowledge, and any combination of skills.
